claims.text: Mercuryo is trusted by 500+ leading web3 companies.
support: Visible partner logos on official site
claims.risk_if_overstated: Low if kept to the published count and current framing.
Low if used exactly as a public site claim rather than a broader customer-success claim.

claims.text: Mercuryo helps partners keep users on-site while they buy and sell crypto.
support: On-Ramp page title and embedded-flow messaging
claims.risk_if_overstated: Needs care because it is a product promise rather than an independently quantified outcome.

claims.text: Mercuryo helps wallets and web3 companies issue branded payment cards to users.
support: Spend product page headline and offer section
claims.risk_if_overstated: Needs guardrails so it does not imply every partner launches the full card program instantly.

claims.text: Mercuryo is the payment engine behind top web3 businesses.
support: Broad product set and partner roster
claims.risk_if_overstated: Can feel vague unless immediately tied to buy, sell, and spend outcomes.

claims.text: Mercuryo has one of the most trusted compliance stacks in the space.
support: About-page narrative about regulations and compliance
claims.risk_if_overstated: High. This needs third-party validation or measurable proof before it should become core messaging.
